name: Planes v2 Compiler to Canonical IR + Parity Contract
descriptions: Compile split files and monolith adapter into canonical Planes IR with deterministic parity guarantees.
success_criteria: Split-file and monolith inputs compile to canonically equivalent IR.
Compiler resolves basis aliases and frame refs into canonical u/v/w model.

hard_no_go_conditions: monolith and split compile mismatch on ordering/rounding/hit-test
canonical IR contract mismatch against ir types
required_commands: uv run pytest tests -k "planes_split_compile or planes_parity_equivalence or planes_ir_contract" -q

ci_required_checks: uv run pytest tests -k "planes_split_compile or planes_parity_equivalence or planes_ir_contract" -q
